meaning: n.[棒](尤指为增加对手的心理压力) 抚球场草地磨蹭
examples: You may qualify for rent discount by doing part-time groundskeeping. 122. Buy a property.
The range of Devens inmates also includes a cadre of low-security prisoners who cut the lawns and do other groundskeeping work.
Outsourcing, which once meant mainly the simple offloading of such auxiliary activities as groundskeeping, the corporate canteen or the data processing center, is very different today.
